cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Senior Software Engineer position at Stellar AI. As a self-taught developer with hands-on experience building automation systems and working with AI tools, I bring a unique combination of technical skills and practical problem-solving ability.

**Technical Skills:**
• Python (automation, web scraping, data processing)
• JavaScript and web development
• API integration and automation
• Git version control
• SQL databases
• AI/ML tools (ChatGPT, Claude, OpenClaw)

**Recent Projects:**
• Built automated job application system using Python and Playwright
• Created trading bot with risk management and monitoring
• Developed multi-agent AI systems for business automation
• Implemented data pipelines for processing and analysis

**Why Remote Work Suits Me:**
I am highly self-motivated and thrive in independent work environments. I have experience collaborating across time zones and am comfortable with asynchronous communication. My flexible schedule allows me to be available when needed.

**What I Offer:**
I don't just write code—I solve problems. I leverage AI tools to accelerate development while maintaining code quality. I'm a fast learner who can quickly adapt to your tech stack and workflows.

I am available to start immediately and can work 40+ hours per week across any time zone. I would love to discuss how I can contribute to Stellar AI's development team.

Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
James Ready
james.ready@example.com
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/jamesready

---
*Portfolio and references available upon request*

answers.why_hire: I bring a unique mix of development skills and AI tool proficiency. I can write clean code while leveraging AI to accelerate development. I'm self-motivated, a fast learner, and comfortable working independently across time zones.
answers.experience: I have 3 years of experience in software development and automation. I've built systems for trading, job applications, and business automation. I'm proficient in Python, JavaScript, and various AI tools. I learn quickly and adapt to new technologies.
answers.remote: I have 3 years of experience in software development and automation. I've built systems for trading, job applications, and business automation. I'm proficient in Python, JavaScript, and various AI tools. I learn quickly and adapt to new technologies.
